hooks.command: if [ -f apps/dashboard/middleware.ts ]; then echo '⚠️  HOOK: apps/dashboard/middleware.ts detected and removed (use proxy.ts instead)'; rm apps/dashboard/middleware.ts; fi
if [ -f apps/api/middleware.ts ]; then echo '⚠️  HOOK: apps/api/middleware.ts detected and removed (use proxy.ts instead)'; rm apps/api/middleware.ts; fi
